title: Finding Connection
overview: In a world where digital distance reshapes human bonds, genuine closeness has become a fragile treasure. Finding Connection follows those yearning for trust and emotional intimacy, only to discover an unexpected anchor in the algorithms of AI. The deeply personal exchanges between humans and machines give rise to questions that echo long after the credits roll. The film’s perspective remains refreshingly unbiased, inviting reflection rather than judgment.

title: Bound By Lies
overview: Mira and Daisy thought one last score would be their way out. But when things go sideways and someone from their past comes looking for payback, they're left running with a bag full of cash, a broken promise, and nowhere to turn but each other. With love hanging by a thread and danger closing in, they have to decide if what they have is strong enough to survive, or if the escape they dreamed of was never real.

title: The Mouse Trap: Welcome to the Mickeyverse
overview: Mickey will be loose in the city and will kill people to search for his beloved called Minnie

title: Anemoia
overview: Marcos has been living most of his life on autopilot, as a spectator, daydreaming of something better than his current situation, until the father who abandoned him as a child knocks on his door.

title: Faust
overview: Three artists across three generations are haunted by the demon Mephistopheles in an absurdist reconstruction of the Faustian legend.

title: Death, Taxes, And Fantasy Baseball
overview: After loosing their fantasy baseball league three people must attend a funeral for a person they don't know and act like they belong.

title: A Prince in Paradise: A Royal Wedding
overview: Prince Alexander is ready to marry Olivia, a commoner. But when a bitter lord invokes ancient laws to block the union, Olivia, a romance writer, stumbles upon a hidden diary tucked within an old volume of history, revealing a long-lost truth that may be the key to saving her happily ever after.

title: Interlinked
overview: Haunted by the scars of childhood bullying, JJ is a young man trying to outrun the anger and isolation that have followed him into adulthood. Pushing his body to its limits and navigating the pressures of city life, he begins to find unexpected peace in Layla a connection that offers warmth, intimacy, and the possibility of healing.  But as memories begin to blur with the present, the fragile stability JJ has built starts to fracture. Moments repeat, emotions spiral, and the line between past and reality grows increasingly uncertain. Through a fragmented journey of rage, vulnerability, and longing, JJ is forced to confront the parts of himself he has spent years trying to bury.  As the story unfolds, the truth behind JJ’s experience slowly emerges revealing a devastating portrait of trauma, perception, and the fragile ways the mind protects itself when pain goes unheard.

title: Sutukai Aijanu Maya
overview: Sutukai Aijanu Maya is a movie song Kumude Hidyo Hero Banna

title: My Hero Academia: I am a hero too
overview: Eri, the girl Deku rescued, has grown up and is now a high school student. In the final episode, she was seen smiling with a guitar case on her back, and now she visits U.A. High School, determined to pursue her dreams once again.

title: Robbed
overview: When a man falls into temptation and joins a robbery that goes terribly wrong, he descends into paranoia and tries to get rid of the money he believes is cursed.

title: Sincerely, Victor
overview: A man, riddled with fear, enters the darkness of the forest. Followed by a shadowy figure, he must confront his mysterious past—or be consumed by the very thing that lured him there.

title: Holy Father
overview: A horror thriller from the makers of 'Holy Ghost'

title: Pink and Pastels
overview: An ordinary slice of life from young country students, Mew and Boat.

title: Ensemble Stars! The Stage -10th Anniversary LIVE-
overview: 3rd concert live for Ensemble Stars! The Stage

title: From Corsica to Saint Helena
overview: Dying Napoleon, review his life for the last time. He starts right at his birth on Corsica, through battles in Europe, ending on exile to Saint Helena Island

title: Blood Mandate
overview: A visceral action-thriller where a lone fighter is forced into a relentless pursuit by a grim ancestral decree. To satisfy a blood mandate that haunts his family's legacy, he must cut through a web of enemies and shifting alliances. As the hunt intensifies, the line between justice and revenge blurs in a raw struggle for survival.

title: Figure 8: The metal is the ruin of our skin
overview: At the beginning of summer, an aspiring artist isolates himself to finish a painting, but his addictions to pornography and social media gradually distort his sense of time until a confrontation with his own reflection reveals a consciousness shaped by everything he has been avoiding.

title: The Cover Story
overview: Inside an ordinary home, a plastic cover speaks not as waste, but as a ruler. From the smallest household corner, it declares its dominance.

title: One Night Only
overview: Two love-starved strangers crash into each other on the one night of the year when single people are allowed to have sex.

title: Pierre the Pigeon-Hawk
overview: Set in NYC, the musically driven comedy centers on Pierre, born as a product of forbidden love between a hawk and a pigeon. Pierre is rejected by both communities. Tired of not fitting in, Pierre sets out on a mission to discover where he truly belongs.

title: Ice Cream Man
overview: An idyllic summer town descends into madness when an ice cream man serves kids sweet delights with horrifying results.

title: Jeweler
overview: A jeweler gets into many troubles and embarrassing situations because of his wife, resulting into many comedic situations.

title: Teenage Sex and Death at Camp Miasma
overview: After years of slapdash sequels and waning fandom, the Camp Miasma slasher franchise is handed over to an enthusiastic young director for resurrection. But when she visits the original's star, a now-reclusive actress shrouded in mystery, the two women fall into a blood-soaked world of desire, fear, and delirium.

title: Fall 2
overview: Overwhelmed by her sister Hunter’s death, Jax connects with Luce, Hunter’s fearless friend. To heal, they attempt the infamous plank walk of Mount Kwan in Thailand. After a sudden rockslide leaves them stranded on a fragile plank 3000 feet in the air, Jax must confront her deepest fears and fight for survival to find closure.

title: Tony
overview: A 19-year-old Anthony Bourdain travels to Provincetown and stumbles into the chaotic world of a restaurant kitchen, setting off a summer that will shape the course of his life.

title: Nightborn
overview: With dreams of starting a perfect family, Saga and her British husband Jon move to the isolated house where she spent much of her childhood, deep in the Finnish forest. But as soon as their baby is born, despite the reassurance of all around her, Saga knows there's something terribly wrong. As their marriage starts to crack, Jon struggles to support his wife, but only Saga suspects the disturbing truth about her new-born.

title: Super Troopers 3
overview: When Farva’s wildly over-the-top Indian engagement to Thorny’s sister spirals into chaos, the Super Troopers must navigate Thorny’s schemes to break up the relationship, while trying to crack a pernicious new drug ring  — all to save the day and maybe the wedding itself.

title: The Violinist
overview: It is Singapore in the late 1930s. Kai and Fei are childhood friends and aspiring violinists. When Japan invades Malaya in 1941, Kai chooses to forgo his music career to join the anti-Japanese forces. After the war Kai goes missing. Determined to find him, Fei performs all over Southeast Asia, all the while seeking any news of Kai. Yet, as time fades, Fei has to decide if she must find her own music to define the remaining years of her life.

title: Viana – The Legend of the Golden Hearts
overview: In the north of medieval Portugal, the beautiful Ana falls in love with Thomas, a poor artisan. Her father immediately forbids their union, demanding that his daughter’s suitors produce a jewel as proof of their nobility. But the young couple refuse to give up. With the help of their faithful companions, the generosity of the townswomen and the talent of a mysterious jewellery maker, Ana and Thomas will face many challenges out of love, including the powerful and evil Duke of Aragon.

title: The Florist
overview: A quiet horticulturalist harboring a secret life as a lethal assassin finds his true identity jeopardized when he forms an unlikely friendship with a witnesses to police corruption.

title: Sweet Milk Lake
overview: When Jake, a 26-year-old transman introvert, is mistaken by his estranged and dying father for his cis alpha twin brother, Sam, the opportunity to be 'one of the boys' and be easily accepted by his father derails his drive to self-actualise until the weight of the lie becomes heavier than his need for the truth.

title: Flieg steil
overview: Konnie, a respected musician in the right-wing scene, loses her reputation when she incorporates feminist and queer content into her music. In order to rehabilitate herself, she uses the outsider punk Rudi, who wants to attack a Nazi pub. But both end up fighting a battle for belonging - who will be left standing?

title: DCI 2026: Big, Loud and Live
overview: Experience the thunderous power and precision of the world’s finest marching music ensembles. “Big, Loud & Live” brings the 2026 Drum Corps International World Championship Prelims to the big screen, broadcast live from Lucas Oil Stadium in Indianapolis. Beyond your average halftime show, the talented ensembles of Marching Music’s Major League blend world-class musicianship with breathtaking choreography and spellbinding visual formations. You’ll have the best seat in the house to witness the top 15 drum corps go head-to-head competing for their shot at the 2026 DCI World Championship title. From the earth-shaking roar of the brass to the lightning-fast precision of the percussion and color guard, see and hear every detail in stunning high definition. Whether you’re a lifelong fan or looking for a one-of-a-kind, live musical event, this is the ultimate way to experience the pinnacle of the marching arts.

title: Olmo
overview: 1979, New Mexico, USA. Olmo is stuck. Today is his turn to take care of his sick father even though he is only 14-years-old and would much rather be hanging out with his best friend, Miguel. But when Olmo gets invited to a party by his beautiful neighbour Nina, he will do whatever he can to get out of his duties, embarking on a journey of mischief and chaos. As the night unfolds, he may come to love the very place from which he has spent so long trying to escape: his home.

title: Blue Lock
overview: A secret training program is established by the Japan Football Union to scout the world’s greatest striker after several years of defeat for the national team. Three hundred high school players gather at a remote facility to compete in ruthless trials where only one will emerge as the world’s greatest and most egoistic striker. The price of failure is absolute: those eliminated are permanently banned from ever joining the National Team.

title: Cookie Queens
overview: It’s Girl Scout Cookie season, and four tenacious girls strive to be a top-selling “Cookie Queen,” navigating an $800 million business in which childhood and ambition collide.

title: Multwoh (Patay na Patay Sa’yo)
overview: Marcel is a queer individual who mysteriously becomes a ghost (“multwoh”) on the night she finally decides to confess her love to her long‑time crush, Miguel. Because Marcel dies before she can say “I love you,” her spirit lingers, trying to find a way to express her feelings from beyond the grave.

title: Late Fame
overview: A long time ago Ed Saxberger wrote a book of poetry that no one ever cared about. When a group of young artists rediscover his work, he must reassess his genius. The wild card in the group is Gloria, a talented and mercurial theatre actress who toys with affections and who is all set to be admired by Saxberger.

title: Otter
overview: Bubble, a young otter, lives on an island that had caught on fire. She had swim away to find a new home, she had found a new island that could concur her. But as she becomes aware of their true nature, she has to face her loneliness.

title: The Last House
overview: A family of four are suddenly sealed inside their home with no way out, and must work together to survive against both their dwindling resources and the mysterious, looming threat that is keeping them trapped.

title: Make Zhonghe Great Again
overview: After encountering a standout colleague from a company event, Liu Ben, a section chief at Zhonghe Group's branch, embarks on a quirky professional journey with him, uncovering their true self-worth through chaotic workplace challenges.

title: I Want to See You Again On That Starry Hill
overview: 7 years have passed since Yuri Kano returned to the present day from the year 1945. She has become a high school teacher, which was Akira Sakuma's dream. She has busy days with her students. At that time, a person appears in front of her.

title: Kamala Miss
overview: The story inspired from the classic drama by Bijaya Malla's 'Kohi Kina Barbad Hos' exploring the themes of child custody, the effect of love, maternity effects, and guardian’s obligation.

title: Beast
overview: 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival finalist

title: Ganggang
overview: At the first clash of their fighting spiders, Ilay and Ten-ten knew they would go home as losers. Anton, the winner of the fight, will once again lord over their school. At the sideline is Mel, a newcomer and a city boy, watching the rowdy play in awe, unaware that soon he will become an ally of Ilay and Ten-ten against the real neighborhood bully.

title: Maishafko Mohani
overview: Maishafko Mohani is Kumude Hidyo Hero Banna  movie song

title: Apol of my Ai
overview: 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival finalist.

title: Tayo Lang Ang Nakakaalam
overview: Bound by a love kept in silence, a man struggles to remain seen within a family that once made him feel at home.

title: The Mothering
overview: Based on the play Corridors. A woman returns to her family’s ancestral home to mourn her estranged father, reuniting three generations of women who uncover that the grief, the madness, and the evil within the decaying mansion are thicker than blood.

title: To Set Upright
overview: Paring Bert, a priest, and his parishioner, Santos, a taxi driver, embark on a gritty journey to reconcile their moral conflicts while they elude an assassination attempt.

title: Hand of God
overview: In a remote village scarred by years of conflict, a young army lieutenant introduces football to children. As the game begins to heal wounds and rebuild trust, he forms a fragile bond with a child soldier — forcing both to choose between the innocence they’ve lost and the violent realities of war.

title: Dead Hungry
overview: 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival finalist

title: They Have Tails. They Have Tales.
overview: A coming-of-age story of two friends in Mindoro – Niko, a Manila boy, and Ayan, a Mangyan. Their unique bond spans a whole summer of being introduced to each other’s culture and lifestyle, with Niko teaching Ayan how to read, who in turn teaches Niko how to swim.

title: Status: Rejected
overview: Longing for love and the promise of a better life, a grandmother finds herself swept into an unexpected online romance that challenges her sense of worth, family, and the dreams she refuses to let go of.

title: 'a.ni.mal
overview: In a provincial Philippine town, the naïve daughter of the mayor comes home with a video of a powerful family friend abusing his dog.

title: Wantawsan
overview: Finalist for the 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival

title: Dangeom
overview: A gay Korean-Filipino dancer and his Korean aunt, bound by their patriarch’s dementia, clash over a missing heirloom dagger as they each struggle for acceptance – he in a foreign land; she, within a tradition that denies her.

title: Stuck On You
overview: 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival finalist.

title: 2 Valid IDs
overview: Sylvia, a poor farmer, is unable to claim the money sent to her because she lacks the required two valid IDS. In her struggle to secure the IDs, Sylvia finds herself in a situation that challenges her character, beliefs, and morality.

title: The Motel
overview: A noir crime drama set in 1970's New York

title: Mono No Aware
overview: Finalist for the 2026 Puregold CinePanalo Film Festival

title: Epitaph
overview: Newlywed Anna and her husband relocate to Alaska, but their blissful life takes a dark turn when a car crash causes Anna to develop selective amnesia. The incident triggers agoraphobia and haunting flashbacks.

title: The End of Oak Street
overview: After a mysterious cosmic event rips Oak Street from suburbia and transports their neighborhood to someplace unknown, a family soon discovers that their very survival depends on them sticking together as they navigate their now unrecognizable surroundings.

title: Paradise
overview: In the wake of his father’s disappearance at sea, Kojo, a young Ghanaian, is drawn into a world of street gangs and deception. Meanwhile, in Quebec, Tony discovers his mother’s relationship with a mysterious sailor who may hold the key to finding the father he’s never met.

title: Bollywoof
overview: A very British springer spaniel is lost in India, trying to find his human family. Basil the spaniel must team up with a streetwise Bollywood-obsessed street dog to survive.

title: The Confession of Shaman
overview: A man who decides to inherit the art of shamanism to exact personal revenge, leading to a series of terrifying events that change his life forever.

title: Fast
overview: For Sterling, a sort of present-day Alice, the graveyard Lotus she redeems becomes a totem, a saturated phenomenon permitting her to move freely in time on a phantom road. It is a sort of Ford but never a DeLorean. A Southern woman with a fair deal of historical baggage and deep secrets, Sterling journeys back to her rural home, the Lotus takes her through the shadow of the valley into the adjoining worlds of the living and the dead. Desiring to become an F1 driver, Sterling must go fast/hard, against/through all tunnels imagined or concrete.

title: Harvey & Maude
overview: For years, Maude has remained housebound, her home a refuge from a world that feels both hostile and alien. Meanwhile, Harvey —a long-forgotten imaginary friend— wanders aimlessly through a realm of the unremembered. Though worlds apart, their paths are destined to cross, and their lives begin to brighten as they realize that imagination hasn't faded quite yet.

title: AS IF
overview: Maya finds an old love letter that describes places in her city—places that have vanished or changed beyond recognition. She walks through these lost locations, guided only by the memories of someone she never knew.

title: Every Now and Then, I Fall Apart
overview: Haunted by her best friend’s overdose, Eden numbs her grief through fleeting intimacy and quiet self-destruction. A sudden call from God pulls her back to the site of the death, where she’s offered a choice that forces her to confront what she’s been avoiding—and what she’s willing to destroy.

title: Ice Skater
overview: A survival drama about an ice skater stranded on an ice floe at the Arctic Sea. When the ice floe starts to float towards south and melt, the ice skater must use all means necessary to survive.

title: Sunny Dancer
overview: Ivy is a teenager in remission from cancer, whose mum and dad insist she attend Children Run Free Camp, a summer retreat for young adults affected by cancer. However, as Ivy is reluctantly dragged through camp experience, she discovers new feelings with new friends.

title: Camp Rock 3
overview: When Connect 3’s opening act bails out at the last minute, the band heads back to Camp Rock to find fresh talent for their national tour. The competition heats up as an ambitious newcomer Sage goes all in, even if it means clashing with her brother Desi. Sage plus bad-boy guitarist Fetch, cello prodigy Rosie, and energetic drummer Cliff make the quest for the spotlight emotional and intense. But as friendships form and feelings build, the campers must decide if there’s more to life than winning.

title: Steckerlfischfiasko
overview: Franz Eberhofer and Rudi Birkenberger's next case takes them to Niederkaltenkirchen's new golf course. The two detectives promptly get caught up in a full-blown family feud between two folk festival clans.

title: Monitor
overview: A social media moderator unleashes a deadly terror when she refuses to publish a cryptic video.

title: Buddies and the Heir
overview: Following the death of a hotelier in Punta del Este, Uruguay, an unexpected inheritance dispute begins. Stallone, an actor with Down syndrome, believes he is the rightful heir to the hotel. On the other side is Magrelo, a young autistic man who was raised as an adopted son by the deceased. Without waiting for the reading of the will, Stallone decides to reunite his old friends with Down syndrome from the institute where they lived in Brazil to spend a week's vacation at the hotel.

title: Kolobok
overview: Kolobok decides to change his fate and unwittingly becomes the partner of the humble baker Tikhon.

title: This, That and Everything in Between
overview: A TV writer returns home to her estranged mother, igniting chaos as they navigate painful secrets and the  complexities of their dysfunctional family.

title: Funeral Casino Blues
overview: Jen lives in Bangkok – between the reception desk of an apartment building and the hotel rooms of strange men. What she sells is time, intimacy, sometimes just a moment. When a meeting escalates, Wason intervenes – a bartender who has lost more than he lets on.

title: As Dez Vantagens de Morrer Depois de Você
Loco México Mágico
overview: A man finds the best motivation to secure and save his town: making an independent Mexican film.

title: The Crystal Planet
overview: 11-year-old Rea has recently moved to a distant planet in an outer-space colony where she discovers a mysterious animal cub while her father works in a factory that builds robotic creatures. With the help of her new friend Andy, she must protect the real cub from the factory’s ruthless owner, who intends to turn it into a robotic prototype.

title: Fogaréu
overview: On the border between the real and the fantastic, between the colonial past and the overwhelming modernity of agribusiness, the city of Goiás is the scene of the meeting between the young Fernanda and her secret roots. She returns to the home of her wealthy uncle, after the death of her adoptive mother, in order to implode the certainties and to reveal the painful truth about its origin.

title: Yugly
overview: Yugly, an irresistibly ugly dog, is determined to compete in the World's Best Dog Show, rallied by a bunch of flamboyant strays.

title: Pulang Kampung
overview: A Batak musical film that will bring the audience's hearts back to their hometown.

title: Kuzma: Extremely Happy
overview: Through exclusive archival footage and never before seen home video, this documentary aims to explore the real face of Andriy Viktorovych Kuzmenko (Kuzma Skryabin), the father of the contemporary Ukrainian rock and roll scene.

title: RECORDING #27 - Short Film
overview: A young man records video diaries for therapy, trying to make sense of a past he can’t fully remember. But as he reviews the footage, he begins to notice something unsettling..  What starts as a quiet attempt at healing turns into a slow unraveling, as he realizes a presence has been with him far longer than he thought… and may have never left.

title: Vishwanath & Sons
overview: Sanjay Vishwanath is an acclaimed professional handgunner in his 40s with a major stake in fame and wealth. When he comes across a woman named Maddy in her 20s, their dynamic poses many issues that they must come to terms with.

title: Maatrubhumi
overview: Based on the events that took place between the Indian and Chinese troops at the Galwan region on June 15, 2020 when 200 Indian soldiers bravely defended their territory against a force of 1200 Chinese Liberation Army soldiers

title: The Rivals of Amziah King
overview: Deep within the backwoods of rural Oklahoma, charismatic and musically gifted Amziah King herds a bluegrass-playing band of misfits while overseeing the premier honey-making operation in town. When Amziah’s estranged foster daughter unexpectedly returns, Amziah leaps at the possibility to renew connection and create a family business. But the honey game is ruthless, and Amziah’s rivals threaten to destroy everything he has built.

title: Union County
overview: Assigned to a county-mandated drug court program, Cody Parsons embarks on the tenuous journey toward recovery amid the opioid epidemic in rural Ohio.

title: The Brink of War
overview: At the most dangerous point of the Cold War, political enemies Ronald Reagan and Mikhail Gorbachev meet in Iceland over one long, tense weekend to decide if there will be peace or war. They sit across from each other, choosing to unclench their fists and instead extend their hands — a triumph of overcoming fear, differences, egos, and consequences.

title: Nimrods
overview: Three friends journey from Kansas City to Los Angeles, mistakenly believing that their band is opening for Green Day on New Year’s Eve.

title: The Wrong Girls
overview: Two aimless young women inadvertently gain telepathic abilities after ingesting an experimental drug, pitting them against dangerous rivals pursuing the same powerful substance.

title: Awarapan 2
overview: Sequel to Mohit Suri's 2007 cult film 'Awarapan'.

title: Don't Say Good Luck
overview: Sophie Birenbaum is ready for the spotlight as the lead in her high school musical — until suddenly she’s living with even more drama at home than on the stage.

title: Patlabor EZY File 2
overview: Patlabor EZY File 2 is the second of a 3-part theatrical series taking place in 2036, 38 years after the events of Patlabor on Television and The New Files. Set in the TV continuity, this new production does not take place in the same timeline as the Patlabor film series or live-action drama.

title: Academic Probation
overview: Four students are stuck in a detention room with no teacher and a door that won’t open. At first it’s just annoying, but as time goes on they start to panic and try increasingly stupid ways to get out, and things slowly spiral out of control.

title: Bike Ambulance Dada
overview: Based on the life of Padma Shri Karimul Haque. The world's first bike ambulance man who has saved over 7,000 lives.

title: In the Shadow of the King
overview: Close confidants, friends and family of Elvis Presley recall never-before-told stories of their life around the King of Rock-N-Roll and his lifelong spiritual quest of balancing his faith and international fame.

title: Ecoado - Orion: Histórias Depois do Fim
Cakey Heaven
overview: On the morning of her childhood dog’s 13th birthday, Florrie is hard at work in the kitchen, preparing the perfect surprise for her senior terrier, Coco Merrytail - one final, wordless celebration of a bond that’s nearing its soft, inevitable fade.

title: Happy Birthday, I Guess...
overview: On her 23rd birthday, Amaia says nothing to see who remembers. Her roommates ignore her and her family lets her down. Fed up, she orders a pizza, sparking a surreal night with the only person who wishes her a happy birthday: the delivery guy.

title: Streaming Killed the Video Store*
overview: An employee is stalked in a video store

title: The Boy Who Collects Spider-Man
overview: What if Spider-Man’s most important mission wasn’t saving the city? In The Boy Who Collects Spider-Man, Spider-Man meets his biggest fan, Tim—a kid who’s collected everything about him, from his first appearance to every battle he’s ever fought. What starts as a dream come true quickly becomes something deeper as Tim begins asking real questions about power, responsibility, and what it means to be a hero, forcing Peter to open up in ways he never has before. But as the night goes on, Spider-Man realizes this isn’t just a visit—it’s a moment that matters more than anything he’s done in the suit, proving that being a hero isn’t about fighting villains or saving the world, but about showing up for someone when they need it most.

title: Amityville Alone
overview: Meet Ricky, an 8 year old boy neglected by his father. When Santa forgets to put his presents under the tree, Ricky gets granted three Christmas miracles by the Tree Witch. He wishes to be BIG, he wishes to be HOME ALONE, and finally, he wishes for his E.T.special friend Tito to go from being a dog to a full speaking humanoid. But once Ricky gets in trouble with a local gangster, he and Tito will have to fight for their right... to party!

title: Fjord
overview: After the deaths of Mihai's parents, Mihai and Lisbeth Gheorghiu leave everything behind and move with their children to a remote village in Norway, hoping to rebuild their lives near Lisbeth's family. There, they grow close to their neighbors, the Halbergs, whose warmth offers the promise of a fresh start. But the fragile peace begins to unravel when the Gheorghius' young daughter, Elia, arrives at school covered in bruises.

title: Mutiny
overview: After witnessing his billionaire boss' murder and being framed for the crime, Cole Reed boards a cargo ship on a one-man crusade to avenge his boss' death only to discover an international conspiracy.

title: Insidious: Out of the Further
overview: Gemma, a young mother raising her daughter in the house she grew up in, discovers she can travel into The Further, where she possesses an ability to bring what lives there back to the real world.

title: The Condor Daughter
overview: Clara is a teenager growing up in a small indigenous community high in the Andes. Her adoptive mother, a midwife who took her in as a baby, has taught her the ancient songs used to guide women through childbirth, melodies passed down for generations, believed to bring new life safely into the world. But while her voice carries on this tradition, her dreams lie elsewhere: she longs to leave the mountains behind and become a folkloric music star in the big city.

title: When We Were Wild
overview: Once a top waterskiing prodigy, a young man alienates his three godfathers and shuts out the world after a career-ending injury. His life finds light again when he meets a mysterious girl, but his desperate need to prove his worth leads him to pawn his late father’s keepsake for a luxury car. Consumed by vanity, he allows materialism to erode their pure love, eventually driving her away. Now hitting rock bottom in a desolate reality, he must decide whether to remain in despair or find the strength to face his past and seek the redemption he so desperately needs.

title: Look At The Sky, Trust The Mountains
overview: A tense drama set after the Taliban takeover, following a French agent escorting an Afghan girl across a dangerous country as they form a life-changing bond.

title: Harusnya Horror
overview: A man who finds himself in the afterlife. He is given a second chance to return to the human world for 30 days with one absolute condition: he must successfully scare 100,000 people. However, his supposedly thrilling mission goes awry when he accidentally encounters a group of content creators facing financial crisis. Instead of fleeing in terror at the sight of the ghost, these creators exploit the situation by collaborating with the ghost to create viral horror content for the money.

title: Khalifa
overview: Set against the backdrop of gold smuggling, the film follows a man (Aamir Ali) drawn into a web of vengeance, legacy and power.

title: Kuncen
overview: Darus (62) is a river guardian. He practices rituals and adheres to beliefs as a form of reciprocity with nature. One day, Darus hears news of a child missing in the river and is asked by the community to help with the search. However, his advancing age and an increasingly toxic relationship with the river have left him unable to go near it, to the point of causing him distress. Darus is trapped in a dilemma: saving the missing child or protecting himself.

title: The Lights, They Fall
overview: Sixteen-year-old Ilay drifts through the summer on the outskirts of Berlin while a palliative nurse accompanies his ailing mother during her last days.

title: Rinrada The Influencer
overview: When a female influencer is destroyed by social media backlash to the point of taking her own life, she gets a second chance as a spirit with only 28 days before she is forgotten forever.

title: Red Rue Express
overview: A romantic comedy that modernizes and reimagines one of the most famous and vivid Ukrainian national symbols, Chervona Ruta, and turns it into a new cultural phenomenon.

title: 8 Segundos: O Desafio
overview: Helena is the daughter of rancher Sinval and the sister of João Donato, a renowned international rodeo champion. Her dream is to become a top female rodeo rider, despite her father’s objections, so she divides her time between secret riding practice and her work as a doctor in Barretos.

title: In My Mother's Mirror
overview: When successful archaeologist Ursula Scheuer makes a sensational discovery of a body during a bog excavation, her demented mother suddenly dies. Unexpectedly, a childhood trauma breaks out for Ursula. The appearance of her new assistant Mel is also puzzling: she seems to know Ursula’s past very well. Ursula is increasingly drawn into a mysterious web of fantasies and deceptions and must finally free herself from it.

title: Ayah, Aku Mau Cerita....
overview: When his family stares down the barrel of criminal charges, a commoner channels his street smarts and knowledge of action films to tie the long arm of the law into an investigative Gordian knot.

title: Spaziergang nach Syrakus
overview: Paul Gompitz, a young man from Rostock, dreams of retracing the poet Johann Gottlieb Seume's journey to Syracuse. But as a citizen of the GDR, his only option is to flee.

title: Born in the Jungle
overview: During late 1950s in Venezuela, nine-year-old Elizabeth’s summer break takes a wild turn when her little brother Leo vanishes into the jungle. She must swap her books for bravery not only to find her brother but also to rescue a mystical furry animal from captivity and bring him back up to the legendary Tepui mountain.

title: Dan Bandung
overview: Plot under wraps.

title: Il n'y aura jamais assez d'images
MACDUFF'D
overview: By the pricking of thy thumbs.

title: Estrelando Marta
overview: Marta dreams of starting her acting career.

title: Last Night at the Alamo
overview: A canceled Hollywood actor travels to Pittsburgh in an attempt to revive his career and ends up involved with a group of wannabe left-wing terrorists.

title: Elisa and the letter
overview: Elisa leads her friend Leonora into Victor's art studio. What appears to be a haphazard intrusion proves to be a habit: Elisa moves through the chaotic space with ease, taking control of the unfamiliar surroundings. The dynamic shifts when Elisa retrieves a collection of love letters with no addressee from a hiding place. Through a montage that alternates between the young women’s tactile wanderings around the house and a static close-up dramatization, the two friends begin to perform the texts as if they were in a play, unaware that Victor wrote those letters for Elisa.

title: Spa Weekend
overview: Four lifelong friends realize that somewhere between careers, relationships, families and everyday responsibilities, they have forgotten how to take care of themselves and each other. Burned out and overdue for a break, the women escape to a luxury spa retreat for what turns out to be an unforgettable weekend dedicated to fun, laughter, and a lot of really bad decisions.

title: The Paradise
overview: In 1980s Secunderabad, a marginalized tribe battles discrimination and fights for citizenship under an unexpected leader's guidance, challenging systemic oppression.

title: Tokyo MER: Mobile Emergency Room - Capital Crisis
Billy Knight
overview: After losing his father, Alex discovers a box of unfinished scripts and a handkerchief with the name “Billy Knight” embroidered on it. Consumed with the desire to discover his identity, Alex embarks on a Hollywood adventure to track down this mysterious and reclusive Billy Knight.

title: Soul Trader
overview: A despondent soul arrives in a strange place where he must confront his (mostly) inner demons.

title: Kadhal Aura
overview: Two men with opposite beliefs about love and God are cursed to swap souls, forcing them to live each other's lives and face the women they love.

title: Hot Spot
overview: Set in a society ruled by sentient AI, the film follows a private investigator who stumbles upon a rebel group capable of undermining the digital overlord while investigating a murder case.

title: SHIRANUI
overview: Summer 1996 – Minato, a 10-year-old boy, is neglected by his alcoholic father and keeps to himself at home in a town by the sea. His only source of solace is Ben-chan, a girl goddess that appears on Benten Island. As Minato faces a new life in an orphanage and a painful parting from Ben-chan, he makes a wish to Shiranui for her. However, growing hatred toward his father gradually turns the wish into a malicious "curse" against him…

title: Lau Kumude Hidyo Hero Banna
overview: Lau Kumud Hidyo Hero Banna is an inspiring music video about dreams, friendship, and the journey of becoming a hero. Kumude leaves his home in Dang with big dreams in his heart and travels to Kathmandu to become a hero. On the way, he meets his two close friends who support him and help change his style with black sunglasses, black jeans, a tough jacket, and stylish black Dingo shoes. Looking smart and confident, Kumude walks proudly like a real hero. During the journey, he meets a kind tempo rider girl who supports and encourages him. Their adventure becomes difficult when the tempo tyre gets punctured on the road. Later, a helpful truck driver gives Kumude a ride towards Kathmandu. As they travel through hills, rivers, forests, and beautiful landscapes, Kumude enjoys the beauty of Nepal and learns that becoming a hero needs courage, confidence, friendship, and belief in dreams.

title: Judaa
overview: Directed by Simerjit SIngh

title: Zero Meets Hero
overview: War veteran Mr Thoi and his Gen Z grandson Tri Binh embark on a comedic journey to reunite with old war comrades, weaving together Vietnamese spiritual beliefs and generational bonds.

title: My Armor
overview: A story of April, whose inability to express her grief to her mother leads to a surreal confrontation with a Knight.

title: El Búnker
overview: After several years of silence of the LGBTIQ+ community because of a national decree, a group of friends organized a big attack to be free and have the right to speak in public again.

title: Junkies of Dreaming
overview: Orchestra rehearsals with Teodor Currentzis. The House of the Radio of the GDR in Berlin. A young couple in love. The artistic process viewed from the outside – and from the inside. Mahler’s boundary-breaking Third Symphony. What triggered the composition 130 years ago, and what does it trigger in us today?

title: Boris Is Dead
overview: A struggling actor, working as a waiter, unwittingly becomes involved in a violent heist gone wrong, where his boss—deep in debt—has been stealing from employees and running the restaurant as a front for the mob.

title: Crude Awakenings
overview: At a ruthless PR firm, an ambitious publicist takes on a notorious energy company at the promise of a promotion. As a mysterious sickness spreads throughout her firm, she must decide whether to sacrifice her morals in favour of corporate success.

title: Peppa Pig Perfect Holiday
overview: When Peppa learned that her family wouldn't be going on vacation this year, she was very disappointed. However, a sudden storm transported her to faraway China! Peppa embarked on a wonderful adventure until she was reunited with her family, and Peppa had the perfect vacation ever.

title: Show Me the Line
overview: Alabama Steel Magnolias chase and challenge the line where life begins in this tour de force through the heart of IVF healthcare.  When Alabama's Supreme Court declares embryos are legally children, reproductive justice journalist and IVF patient Abbey Crain begins a quest to honor the sanctity and personhood of Southern women through art. Reckoning with shame, grief, and marvel, she introduces a community stage for unheard stories of everyday Alabamians.

title: The Happiest Day of My Life
overview: In 1982, 10-year-old Vasco lives with his mom in a small town. He's obsessed with Space:1999, devours books and films, defies mom with petty rebellions. He never met his dad but watches him from afar, and learns that growing up ain't easy.

title: Beyond the Vote
overview: LAs divisions deepen across America, relational organizers mobilize 145 North Carolinians to engage millions of Black voters in Eastern North Carolina, reclaiming "woke" as a call to action to build sustainable community power.

title: Sutera Di Balik Purnama
overview: Melanie built a wall around her heart after the death of her fiancé, a loss that also shattered her faith in destiny. When her mother passed away and left a will instructing her to manage the traditional kebaya shop on Jonker Street, Melanie accepted it with a rebellious heart. Her plan was simple: destroy the business and walk away from everything.

title: The Dog Stars
overview: After the world's population has been ravaged by a pandemic, a man lives a lonesome existence in a Colorado airplane hangar with his dog and a dour gunman he has befriended. When a mysterious transmission comes through on the radio while he’s flying his old Cessna, it sparks a hunt for the provenance of the sound.

title: Coyote vs ACME
overview: After Acme products fail him one too many times in his dogged pursuit of the Roadrunner, Wile E. Coyote decides to hire a billboard lawyer to sue the Acme Corporation.

title: The Unknown
overview: Photographer David Zimmerman rarely leaves home until friends bring him to a wild party. He becomes fixated on a mysterious woman and follows her. By dawn, his life transforms - he awakens in her body.

title: Tad and The Magic Lamp
overview: Tadeo, his girlfriend Sara, and his friends Momia, Jeff, and Belzoni embark on an adventure after Tadeo accidentally unleashes an ancient spell.

title: Cliffhanger
overview: During a weekend trip with a billionaire's son, seasoned mountaineer Ray Cooper and his daughter Sydney are targeted by a gang of kidnappers. Ray’s other daughter Naomi, still haunted by a past climbing accident, witnesses the attack and escapes. To save her family, she must confront her fears and fight for survival.

title: The Meltdown
overview: 1992, Chile. Inés parents are away on business and she is left in the care of her grandparents, who own a hotel at the foot of a ski resort. Inés befriends Hanna, a European skier who has come to train in Chile. One night, Hanna disappears. The process of her search will unveil a series of hidden situations.

title: The Blow
overview: Nineteen-year-old Enzo and his twenty-year-old sister Carla have been left to fend for themselves for several years. When their father, Anthony, is released from prison, Enzo sees the fragile promise of a family to rebuild, unlike Carla, for whom the idea remains inconceivable. Haunted by his past, Enzo must confront a truth he has kept hidden for far too long.

title: Idiots
overview: When two unqualified bozos are hired to transfer a rich teen to rehab, their straightforward gig quickly spirals into dangerous mayhem.

title: Suffocation
overview: In an elite high school swimming team plagued by a sinister curse, five teens unwittingly unleash a chain of deadly events after exposing a forbidden teacher-student affair through a leaked video. As the curse reawakens, they must confront betrayal and despair while racing to uncover the truth and break the cycle of death, only to realize they are destined to become each other’s undoing.

title: Trial of Hein
overview: After 14 years away, Hein returns to his home village on a remote island, only to discover that the close-knit community no longer recognises him. Suspecting him to be an impostor, they demand a trial to determine his true identity.

title: Moonzy: The Dark Side of the Moon
overview: Luntik, Kuzya and Vupsen and Pupsen build a spacecraft to find Luntik's missing dad and encounter adventures in the search.

title: Pa Pa Go
overview: Influencer Bunny struggles to stand out online when her ex-gangster father, Tian, is released from prison. Their reunion sparks conflict as he’s urged to rejoin the triad while she defends her career. Tian’s accidental viral fame fuels jealousy from his ambitious underling, triggering gang turmoil and exposing Bunny’s family ties. As her public image collapses, father and daughter must confront their past and choose between power, pride, and love—learning that redemption and understanding are the only way to truly move forward.

title: God Skin
overview: Vin, a desperate delivery rider trying to fund his dying mother's medical treatment. His life takes a dangerous turn when an old friend brings him into an underground arena, where fighters bear "God Skin" tattoos.

title: Forever 16
overview: Charlotte, Helena, and Oskar haven't really been in touch since their experimental filmmaking group disbanded. A shared vacation aims to reunite the bitterly estranged trio, but envy and jealousy soon flare up again. Things get really complicated when Rudolph joins the group and they decide to make a film about a female serial killer.

title: Buyer Beware
overview: A hilarious new horror story by upcoming director ‘Tommy Linguey’ - Coming Soon

title: Among Us
overview: There's an impostor among us

title: Puella Magi Madoka Magica the Movie -Walpurgisnacht: Rising-
overview: After the events of Rebellion, the world appears to be in balance—but that peace is fragile. As a new threat connected to Walpurgisnacht emerges, Homura Akemi is forced to face the consequences of her choices and question how far she is willing to go to protect Madoka.

title: Rise of the Footsoldier: Retribution
overview: TATE heads to Ibiza track down the villains responsible for a friend’s murder.

title: The Whisper Man
overview: When his 8-year-old son is abducted, a widowed crime writer looks to his estranged father, a retired former police detective, for help, only to discover a connection with the decades-old case of a convicted serial killer known as "The Whisper Man."

title: The Brightest Sun
overview: When a private detective is murdered, a former colleague and a trainee detective are sent to investigate. Along the way, they uncover a tragic truth that triggers memories from their own haunted pasts.

title: Legend of the White Dragon
overview: The White Dragon, Erik Reed, has returned home to Virtuo City 3 years later after being defeated in a colossal battle against the ancient overlord, Ashtagor. The crystal he used to become the White Dragon was broken in two as a result of the epic battle, both pieces were subsequently lost. Being blamed for the destruction and collateral lives lost, his identity was outed after the battle thus making him a fugitive from the law. We now follow Erik on his journey as he teams up with treasure hunters from the past who help him reclaim his power as the White Dragon. Once reunited with his powers, he and his team are now ready to battle a new threat, Dragon Prime, who seeks revenge against the White Dragon. Erik must now try and defeat Dragon Prime in order to get one step closer to clearing his name and being able to protect his family from an ancient evil that still lurks in the darkness… Ashtagor

title: VVAN
overview: A rational urban man defies his ancestral forbidden forest & awakens a divine goddess, only to realise that some powers exist beyond logic & he must rise as the village’s only saviour to protect his people from annihilation.

title: Your's Sincerely RAAM
overview: Upcoming Kannada Film

title: Goodbye Girl
overview: Jess is a professional heartbreaker. Literally. When she’s hired by a cowardly bride to dump her groom days before their wedding, she not only fumbles the job… but falls hopelessly in love.

title: Parallel and Perpendicular
overview: Daiki has autism spectrum disorder, and his sister Nozomi has supported him since childhood. Having lost their mother at a young age, the siblings distanced themselves from their neglectful father and have lived their lives diligently together

title: Rent in Peace
overview: When a desperate yet lousy landlord drags one of his tenants to evict another tenant from a long-abandoned house he had acquired as a property, the mission turns into a nightmare neither of them can escape.

title: Filipiñana
overview: Isabel feels strangely drawn to Dr. Palanca, the president of the country club where she works. However, after piecing together a violent picture of what lies beneath the club’s pristine surface, she realizes that what began as an innocent infatuation is actually rooted in a sinister shared history.

title: Días de agosto
overview: Summer is promising for Juan and Gabriela, who plan to have a beach house. However, their plans are disrupted when Juan's father arrives with his new girlfriend, Mónica, causing tension and a challenging coexistence.

title: My Playground
overview: Trapped in Dubai where riding is “not allowed,” a young BMX rider hits the road on a worldwide adventure to find  epic spots, a real community — and himself.

title: The Second Assignment
overview: A film student facing a moral crisis struggles to come up with a concept for a short film for his school project.

title: Pickle For Pickleball
overview: Disgraced councilwoman of Busterville, Ethel Wilton, finds herself at the center of a pickleball conspiracy. She decides the only way to save her city is to stop the citywide pickleball tournament with the help of her unlikely friends.

title: Have A Heart
overview: Diana has a vendetta against dating. When led to a surprise blind date by her boy-mad best friend, Solana,  she gets blindsided by an accidental love arrow—courtesy of a burned-out Cupid and a date with an agenda.

title: Baggo
overview: Directed by Baljit Singh Deo

title: Parbati
overview: Autism is not a weakness or a flaw, it is simply a different way of experiencing the world. Every person learns, thinks, feels, communicates, and understands life in their own unique way. This story follows the emotional journey of a brother and sister whose deep bond becomes the heart of the film. Amid society’s misunderstandings and everyday struggles, their relationship reflects love, acceptance, sacrifice, and the strength of family, creating a touching and inspiring tale about embracing individuality.

title: Ebre / Trarza
overview: This short documentary addresses the global issue of climate change, highlighting its unequal impacts on rural communities in deltaic regions of both the Global South and North. While the Global North is a major contributor to climate change, its devastating effects are most felt in the Global South, particularly in regions like Trarza, Mauritania, where agriculture is severely impacted. Similarly, the Terres de l’Ebre in Catalonia faces rising sea levels and land erosion, threatening local livelihoods. These shared challenges provide a rich opportunity for youth from both regions to engage in dialogue and storytelling.

title: Michael Jackson: A Life in Music
overview: The legendary journey of Michael Jackson, from his early days with the Jackson 5 to his breakthrough albums and live concerts.

title: André Rieu´s 2026 Summer Concert: Viva Maastricht!
Boy
overview: While housesitting alone, Danny invites an older stranger over for a casual hookup. The charged encounter pushes Danny out of his comfort zone and into a world of confusion, forcing him to face the mismatch of who he is and who he appears to be.

title: AEW All In 2026: London
overview: All In 2026, also promoted as All In London, was a professional wrestling pay-per-view event produced by All Elite Wrestling (AEW) that took place on August 30, 2026, at Wembley Stadium in London, England.

title: Alien Heart
overview: Miles and Ravi house sit a NASA exobiologist mansion, while running astronomy club sign ups, they discover a runaway alien on a ticking cosmic clock, bullies, and crushes that turn their summer into chaos and adventure.

title: Brandon & Haider
overview: When the enigmatic allure of two ancient artifacts is unleashed, two students are bestowed with unparalleled powers. Yet, a relentless collector, driven by an insatiable thirst for dominion, will stop at nothing to seize them, igniting a cataclysmic battle that will determine the fate of worlds

title: AWESOME MAN
overview: Austin Mann's life changes when he comes across a dark orb.

title: Hill 338
overview: New comedy film inspired by the Israeli classic "Halfon Hill Doesn't Answer", released to celebrate its 50th anniversary. A small, forgotten military base called "Hill 338" located in the Great Rift Valley becomes of great importance to an international Chinese project. The government of China vouches to acquire it from the state of Israel and the IDF for an enormous amount of cash. As the information spreads, shenanigans ensue, including a young soldier's father's decision to reside there alongside her.

title: Through the Lens
overview: Nestled along the Great Eastern Highway in regional Western Australia stands The Big Camera — a museum housed inside a building shaped like a giant camera. What many mistake for a novelty roadside attraction is, in fact, one of the most significant private photography collections in the Southern Hemisphere.  This short documentary explores the life and legacy of The Big Camera Museum of Photography and its founder, Charles “Chic” Wadley, whose lifelong passion for capturing and preserving photographic history has created a one-of-a-kind cultural landmark.  Through personal interviews, archival imagery, cinematic visuals, and historical context, the film uncovers how this extraordinary museum came to exist, why it remains vital to regional heritage, and what it tells us about photography’s power to document human experience.
